metadata.description: Final submission prep: Add M9/M10/M11 citations, replace M22 with M11, verify all references, format for NHB submission

summary: Added 3 new references to NHB2026 manuscript (Elmholdt et al. 2025, Matsui & Ferrara 2024, Ziems et al. 2024). Replaced M22 placeholder with Ziems et al. (M11). Added citations at 4 locations in methods.tex and supplementary sections in both NHB2026/sections/ and NHB2026/arxiv/. Updated both references.bib files. Full citation audit: 28 unique references with perfect match between .tex and .bib, zero missing, zero unused.

annotation.content: Citation audit complete: 28 unique references, perfect 1:1 match between .tex citations and .bib entries. Breakdown: 25 original + 3 new methods citations (Elmholdt 2025, Matsui & Ferrara 2024, Ziems et al. 2024). NHB typical range for articles is 30-60 refs; 28 is on the low end but reasonable for a methods-light empirical paper with focused scope.
